item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 150600Z AUTO 33004KT 300V010 CAVOK 05/04 Q1006 NOSIG
🟡 TAF LFOT 150500Z 1506/1606 35005KT CAVOK TEMPO 1512/1521 4000 -SHRA BKN030TCU PROB30 TEMPO 1513/1518 VRB15G25KT 2000 -TSRA BKN030CB BECMG 1518/1521 26005KT PROB30 TEMPO 1605/1606 4000 BR
